name: Mushroom Gravy (Helen)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spoon miso into half a cup of boiling liquid and stir until dissolved.
2. Add onions, mushrooms, sage, and thyme. Cook for 5 minutes.
3. Add 1 1/4 cups more water or stock and continue cooking.
4. Dissolve arrowroot in one quarter cup of water and add to the mixture. Stir until thickened, about 5 minutes.
5. Add a dash of fresh pepper and adjust the amount of miso for the desired gravy taste.
6. Spoon over Holiday Loaf.
